name: io.github.jarmstrong158/agentsync
title: agentsync
description: Multi-agent coordination MCP: claim work, survey peers, resolve conflicts via a git branch as CAS.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTSYNC_REPO
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the shared project git clone used for coordination.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTSYNC_AGENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your unique agent id, used to key your claims.
